stories.title: Initialize repo structure and pyproject.toml
stories.acceptance: uv run pytest discovers tests/ with zero errors; uv run ruff check . passes

stories.title: Write prd.json (machine-readable PRD)
stories.acceptance: python -c "import json; json.load(open('prd.json'))" exits 0

stories.title: Write .ralphrc.json (loop config)
stories.acceptance: python -c "import json; json.load(open('.ralphrc.json'))" exits 0

stories.title: Implement task_runner.py core (stdlib only)
stories.acceptance: AC-05 through AC-10 from PRD.md

stories.title: Write tests for task_runner.py
stories.acceptance: uv run pytest tests/test_task_runner.py -v exits 0

stories.title: Implement ralph.py core loop (stdlib only)
stories.acceptance: AC-11 through AC-18 from PRD.md

stories.title: Implement circuit breaker in ralph.py
stories.acceptance: AC-14, AC-15 from PRD.md; unit test with mock subprocess

stories.title: Write tests for ralph.py
stories.acceptance: uv run pytest tests/test_ralph.py -v exits 0

stories.title: Write .ralph/PROMPT.md template
stories.acceptance: File exists; contains all 5 sections; RALPH_STATUS format is present verbatim

stories.title: Write AGENTS.md template and prd.json.example
stories.acceptance: Both files exist and are valid (json.load passes on prd.json.example)

stories.title: Write pre-commit hook and install.sh
stories.acceptance: AC-01 through AC-04, AC-19, AC-20 from PRD.md

stories.title: Wire up self-hosting: populate .ralph/ for this repo
stories.acceptance: Running task_runner.py status from repo root prints correct task table

stories.title: Write CLAUDE.md (Claude Code context file)
stories.acceptance: File exists at root; contains all four pointers

stories.title: Write README.md
stories.acceptance: AC-24 from PRD.md; all commands in Quickstart are syntactically valid

stories.title: Full acceptance criteria sweep
stories.acceptance: All ACs checked; all prd.json stories pass; task_runner.py next returns {done: true}

stories.title: Open Question: ralph.py --loop-once flag for CI use
stories.acceptance: Resolved: --loop-once implemented in ralph.py
stories.notes: Decision: yes. Runs one iteration and exits 0 (pass) or 1 (fail). Useful for CI cron jobs.

stories.title: Open Question: install.sh git init behavior
stories.acceptance: Resolved: install.sh fails with clear error and git init hint
stories.notes: Decision: no auto-init. Fail loudly with hint: 'run git init in the target directory first'.

stories.title: Open Question: progress.txt gitignore decision
stories.acceptance: Resolved: progress.txt added to .gitignore
stories.notes: Decision: gitignore it. Ephemeral loop log; git history is the real audit trail.

stories.title: Add v0.2.0 stories to prd.json
stories.acceptance: prd.json contains stories TASK-100 through TASK-107

stories.title: Create .mise.toml at repo root
stories.acceptance: AC-100: file is valid TOML with python, uv, just tool pins

stories.title: Create justfile at repo root
stories.acceptance: AC-101 through AC-106: just --list shows all recipes; each recipe works

stories.title: Update CLAUDE.md to use just verbs
stories.acceptance: AC-111: CLAUDE.md references just install, just check, just test, just lint

stories.title: Add scaffold/justfile.example and scaffold/.mise.toml.example
stories.acceptance: AC-107, AC-108: both files exist with EDIT THIS markers

stories.title: Update scaffold/hooks/pre-commit to prefer just check
stories.acceptance: AC-109, AC-110: just check used when justfile present; falls back to .ralphrc.json

stories.title: Update both AGENTS.md files to reference just verbs
stories.acceptance: AC-112, AC-113: both AGENTS.md files use just as primary idiom

stories.title: Fix README.md inconsistencies and add mise/just prerequisites
stories.acceptance: AC-114, AC-115: mise and just in prerequisites; uv sync --extra dev consistent
